creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
sysutils/pwsafe does not state any build or run dependencies.
	Yet it depends on X (at least if X was already installed)

Fix: 

Add dependancy.
How-To-Repeat: 	$ pkg_info -r pwsafe-0.2.0
	Information for pwsafe-0.2.0:

	Depends on:


	$ ldd /usr/local/bin/pwsafe | grep local

	/usr/local/bin/pwsafe:
	libSM.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libSM.so.6 (0x280aa000)
	libICE.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libICE.so.6 (0x280b2000)
	libXmu.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libXmu.so.6 (0x280c9000)
	libX11.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libX11.so.6 (0x280de000)
	libXt.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libXt.so.6 (0x28606000)
	libXext.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libXext.so.6 (0x28656000)
	libxcb.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/libxcb.so.2 (0x28665000)
	libXau.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libXau.so.6 (0x2867c000)
	libXdmcp.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libXdmcp.so.6 (0x2867f000)
	libpthread-stubs.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpthread-stubs.so.0 (0x28684000)
